# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please report it through GitHub's private vulnerability reporting.

**Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

1. Go to the [Security Advisories](https://github.com/rhom6us/WinFormsMcp/security/advisories) page.
2. Click the **"Report a vulnerability"** button on the Security tab.
3. Provide as much detail as possible about the vulnerability.

We will acknowledge receipt and work to address confirmed vulnerabilities promptly.
